One of the like interesting like conversations that Nikon and I have been having a lot lately is like, frankly, like 12 months from now, like I don't know if there is going to truly be a scenario where like you can gamify SEO the way that like you have been in the past.

Coming up are like, you know, basically like what are the ways like we can like improve our visibility and do all that.

Because as AI continues to get better and better and move from that, like we've moved away from that book era.

Speak to the right markets in, then you will not be able to just gamify things.

It's happening all the time.
